03 / Coast

Islands on
your own time.

Tide pools, jungle walks, and long swims that erase the clock.

10 days From $2,160 Host Maya 4 seats left

Indonesia

Ten days is enough to stop measuring hours. You’ll island-hop when the sea allows it, swim when the heat asks for it, and leave whole afternoons unplanned on purpose.

Tide House becomes the center of gravity — open windows, salt air, a porch that eats dinner faster than the dining room does.

Day 01–02
Arrive soft

Settle in. Swim. Learn the tide and the porch.

Day 03–05
Wander wide

Jungle paths, village markets, boat days when the water is kind.

Day 06
Feast slowly

Catch shared with a local cook. Night that won’t end early.

Day 07–09
Go deep

Quieter island day, longer swim, optional volcano dawn.

Day 10
Leave lighter

One last tide-pool walk before the ferry.

Trip details

  • Length10 days
  • From$2,160
  • HostMaya
  • StayTide House
  • DatesJun 4–13 · 2026
  • Seats4 seats left

beyond Indonesia.
